plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present on the page. Visual evidence shows the form has changed to a different layout ('Set 2') which features a single 'Your Name' field instead.
observedIndicators: Visual mismatch: Cache expected 'Last Name' but screenshot shows 'Your Name' (Set 2)
Historical flakiness suggests a dynamic or rotating UI structure (Set 1 vs Set 2)

remediationSteps.details: Trigger a retry with 'clearPageAiCache' set to true. This will force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and generate new instructions that match the current 'Set 2' form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify page stability before AI invocation.
remediationSteps.details: If the form frequently switches between different field sets, ensure there is sufficient waiting for the form to settle before the AI begins its analysis.

plan.notes: This is a classic stale cache scenario. The autonomous agent's overall objective is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), but the deterministic cache contains rigid selectors for a previous version of the form. Clearing the cache will allow the AI to re-evaluate the page and adapt to the current form fields.
